description: Legal document. Handwriting of Natan b. Shemuel? Fragment (upper left corner). Location: Banhā. Dated: [14]61 Seleucid, which is 1149/50 CE, under the reshut of Shemuel b. Ḥananya. The substance of the matter is difficult to figure out. It involves a certain [...] b. Shemuel ha-Levi. Excommunication is involved and there is reported speech (yā mawlāy qad aḥramtu/uḥrimtu...) (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
